name: Power Solution Technologies Public Company Limited
summary: Power Solution Technologies Public Company Limited primarily distributes and installs various types of power control and power backup systems in Thailand. It operates through Power Control System and Power Backup System; Electricity Generating from Renewable Energy; Petroleum Distribution; and Construction segments. The company is also involved in the production and distribution of electricity using solar, wind, biological, biomass, biogas, and waste; design, construction, engineering, and procurement of renewable energy plants, gas stations, and fuel storage.; and invests in other companies. In addition, it engages in the distribution of liquefied petroleum and liquefied natural gas; transportation of oil through a pipeline transport system; operation of gas stations; power and environment monitoring solution; and provides energy management services, including design, consultation, project management, energy consumption analysis, device installation and operation, financing, and measurements through energy management system for buildings. The company was incorporated in 2001 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
